top3.sql:
SELECT AVG(height) 
FROM Player 
WHERE player_api_id IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT home_player_1 
    FROM Match 
    WHERE home_team_api_id IN (
        SELECT team_api_id 
        FROM Team 
        WHERE team_long_name = 'Italy'
    )
    UNION
    SELECT DISTINCT home_player_2 
    FROM Match 
    WHERE home_team_api_id IN (
        SELECT team_api_id 
        FROM Team 
        WHERE team_long_name = 'Italy'
    )
    UNION
    SELECT DISTINCT home_player_3 
    FROM Match 
    WHERE home_team_a...

SELECT AVG(height) 
FROM Player 
WHERE player_api_id IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT player_api_id 
    FROM Match 
    WHERE home_team_api_id IN (
        SELECT team_api_id 
        FROM Team 
        WHERE team_long_name = 'Italy'
    ) 
    OR away_team_api_id IN (
        SELECT team_api_id 
        FROM Team 
        WHERE team_long_name = 'Italy'
    )
);
